query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'v2Stages' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3CY2ATatyDNVhxZ.root --database 4LhGieFmaH5SRJ3NvGaeQq --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'v2Stages' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
stageNumber	int
tierKey	enum
subLevel	int
stageName	varchar
storyBefore	text
storyAfter	text
difficulty	int
questionsPerRound	int
weaponEmoji	varchar
